security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be altered in transit or before submission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering is possible due to lack of data integrity controls.

assumptions: The data flow between the user and the contract is not protected against modification.
The contract does not validate data integrity before processing votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks using digital signatures or hashing algorithms.

description: An attacker might modify vote data to alter the outcome of a proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote submission lacks audit trail and non-repudiation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote submissions are not securely attributable to users.

assumptions: The system does not record timestamps or other metadata to prove vote submission.
The contract does not utilize cryptographic signatures to verify the voter's identity.

mitigation.strategy: Employ digital signatures and blockchain-based logging for immutable vote records.

description: A user might deny having cast a specific vote.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data might be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote privacy is not explicitly addressed in the system.

assumptions: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.
The governance contract does not protect vote data from unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Utilize end-to-end encryption and secure storage protocols for vote data.

description: An attacker could intercept or retrieve vote data during the process.
